meaning: n.庆祝,祭祀,节日vt.宴请,招待,给予...巨大的荣誉
examples: The pop star flew 100 friends in from London and Paris for a two-day fete.
The fete will take place on Sunday, rain or shine.
They tired shortly after lunch—another fete in my honor—and napped in the early afternoon.
Meantime, WME is preparing to fete its Oscar nominees at the agency's annual Oscar party.
The fete overlooked the pyramids, which Mr. Rejwan arranged to stay lighted until 2 a.m.
